ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the building */,
  "building_address_2" TEXT /* Additional address information */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the building */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the building */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the building */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the building information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the building information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., Temperature, CO2) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor within the building */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor readings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the reading */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "reading_value" TEXT /* Value of the reading */,
  "reading_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the reading value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the data was collected */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "indoor_temperature" REAL /* Indoor air temperature */,
  "indoor_co2_level" REAL /* Indoor air carbon dioxide level */,
  "heating_power" REAL /* Power used by the heating system */,
  "ventilation_activation_signal" INTEGER /* Signal for ventilation activation */,
  "ventilation_activation_status" INTEGER /* Status of ventilation activation */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the reading data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_activations" (
  "activation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activation event */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the activation occurred */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that triggered the activation */,
  "activation_type" TEXT /* Type of activation (e.g., ventilation, heating) */,
  "activation_signal" INTEGER /* Signal for activation */,
  "activation_status" INTEGER /* Status of activation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_activations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_activations_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., building manager, maintenance staff, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Securely hashed user password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the sensor data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information of the user who accessed the sensor data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
